chosen_layouts.q4: Q4T16 v1 already prototyped in P9.C13; [expert,out_tile16,k_block,2368], +2.78% vs raw, replacement not sidecar.
chosen_layouts.q5: Q5T16 [expert,out_tile16,k_block,2880], unpack scale/min and tile ql/qh, +2.27% vs raw.
chosen_layouts.q8: Q8T16 [out_tile16,k_block32,544], byte-neutral tile reorder for dense/shared projections.

acceptance: P9.E2 512/128x3 passes with effective fast paths true, not safety-disabled.
512/128 graph replay decode median >=95 tok/s over 3 measured runs.
rocprof decode trace shows T16 kernels dominate and legacy prefill_out absent except documented Q6_K lm-head fallback.
tracked peak remains within 24 GiB-class budget without raw+packed duplication.
